tracks.rawText: 3:29Livewire PowerCustomHigh-energy Vedic metal track featuring aggressive male chanting vocals over a fusion of traditional Indian percussion and heavy thrash metal instrumentation, The arrangement is driven by rapid-fire double-kick drumming and distorted electric guitar riffs that mirror the rhythmic patterns of the Sanskrit verses, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and percussive, utilizing a deep, resonant baritone with a staccato cadence, The production is dense and powerful, with a prominent low-end and sharp, biting guitar tones, The tempo is fast, approximately 140 BPM, maintaining a relentless and intense energy throughout, Traditional elements like the dhol or mridangam are layered with the drum kit to create a unique folk-metal hybrid sound, The song structure is linear and repetitive, building intensity through vocal layering and increasing instrumental complexity1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Livewire Power
